trivia_bullets.text: Torch the Witness is an uncommon red Sorcery from Murders at Karlov Manor. The card's title is a direct expression of the set's murder-mystery premise: silencing witnesses is one of the killer's tactics across the MKM story arc. The Scryfall data shows two art variants: 146a (normal frame) and this card, 146b (alternate/showcase frame) by artist Andrew Mar [Scryfall].

Torch the Witness deals twice X damage to a target creature; if excess damage is dealt, Investigate — creating a Clue token. The Investigate payoff rewards overkill: killing a smaller creature than the X allows creates evidence. This X-spell structure is rare on red sorceries and gives the card unusual scalability [Scryfall oracle text].

Flavor text: "He was scheduled to meet me tomorrow with something important to share. This was no coincidence." — Algrom of the Foundway Associates [Scryfall]. This is the only MKM flavor text in this batch that directly implicates the larger murder plot: the unnamed witness had information and was killed before the meeting. Algrom joins Runubi, Imel, and Udol as named Foundway Associates — a recurring investigator ensemble woven through the set's flavor text layer [Scryfall, WebSearch: MTG Salvation MKM lore].
sources: WebSearch: MTG Salvation MKM flavor text compilation

trivia_bullets.text: Artist Andrew Mar (this variant). EDHREC rank 16399 — the highest Commander uptake among the non-creature spells in this batch, likely because the scalable X-damage plus Investigate payoff fills a removal role while generating value [Scryfall]. Not pauper-legal (uncommon) [Scryfall legalities].
